rationale: This skill is a pure reference document for the Pinecone MCP server tools. The agent invokes these tools through the MCP protocol (already-running server), not by spawning subprocesses or touching local files. Network traffic ultimately reaches Pinecone's API endpoints (api.pinecone.io and related *.pinecone.io hosts) via the MCP server. No filesystem reads/writes/deletes are implied by the documented verbs.
